component.name: WirePlumber Audio Configurator
component.summary: Set sample rate and bit depth per output device

description.p: GTK4 application for configuring the sample rate and bit depth of individual ALSA output devices under PipeWire / WirePlumber 0.5+.

ul.li: Fixed sample rate (44.1–192 kHz) and format (S16LE to F32LE) per device
"Auto" option lets WirePlumber adapt the rate dynamically per source
Live Monitor: shows the currently negotiated format and all active streams
